reviews.comment:
Esta estación de servicio, tiene cola para cargar combustible "crónica"!, siempre, siempre tiene cola, no se puede creer, las mangueras son súper angostas y/o las bombas débiles!, en varios años que voy, los responsables nunca pudieron solucionar este problema, no se puede creer, es como que uno, se pegue el helado en la frente una y otra vez!!

(Translated by Google)
This gas station has a chronic fuel queue! It's always, always queued. It's unbelievable. The hoses are super narrow and/or the pumps are weak! In the years I've been going, the people in charge have never been able to solve this problem. It's unbelievable. It's like sticking ice cream to your forehead over and over again!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8983193634567568949/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWOXVQQkhBEAE
